name: Press Release
template_content:
Below is content from an event announcement. Convert it into a formal press release. Start with a strong headline and opening paragraph summarizing the main highlight(s) of the event or news. Follow proper press release structure: headline, sub-headline (optional), lead (intros), body with supporting details, and end with contact info or availability of further info.

Be concise and factual while establishing credibility and avoiding excessive informality.
